name: Crosshatch Girl Study (4x Upscale)
description: Transform your photo into a detailed pencil and charcoal line sketch portrait with expressive hand-drawn artistry + fast 4x upscale (2 credits)

default_prompts.image_edit: Image A = face source. Create a highly detailed pencil and charcoal head-and-shoulders sketch of a young woman. Face construction: Build the face directly from Image A facial structure (do not redesign or reinterpret). Preserve exact face shape, jawline, cheekbones. Preserve exact eyes, nose, lips, spacing, and proportions. Maintain likeness clearly derived from Image A. Expression & pose: Gently forward-facing with a slight head tilt, large expressive eyes, and a soft warm smile. Hair: Voluminous and slightly messy with many individually drawn strands, natural pencil flow. Style: Traditional graphite and charcoal drawing only — visible strokes, cross-hatching, layered shading, tonal depth from pencil pressure. No photorealism, no digital airbrush, no vector lines, no color. Rendering rules: organic paper texture and natural imperfections, no face stylization or reshaping, no cartoon look, no plastic skin, no AI artifacts. Clothing: Light fantasy-inspired fabric, minimal detail to keep focus on the face. Background: Warm paper tone with soft vignette, no hard elements. Final requirement: The face must clearly match the structure of Image A while adapted into a charcoal-pencil drawing.
default_prompts.upscale: Ultra high-resolution charcoal pencil sketch portrait, fine cross-hatching strokes, expressive tonal shading, paper grain texture, art-studio quality, 8K, HDR
